3z678inbp0t89ahu.question: In how many years was the difference between Disatisfied and Satisfied less than the difference between their means?
3z678inbp0t89ahu.explanation: Calculate the average of the Dissatisfied values across all years (71.67). Find the average of the Satisfied values across all years (25.56). Subtract the Satisfied average from the Dissatisfied average to establish the difference between their means (46.11). Compute the difference between the Dissatisfied and Satisfied values for each individual year. Count how many of those yearly differences fall below the difference between the means.

bnil22qu3wwatrc7.question: According to this chart, what is the difference between the average number of "A better place to live" opinion of Western Europe and the rest?
bnil22qu3wwatrc7.explanation: Treat Western Europe as all listed countries except the former Eastern Bloc nations of Hungary and Poland. Extract the "A better place to live" percentages for these eight Western European countries. Calculate the average of these eight values (24.625). Extract the "A better place to live" percentages for the remaining two countries, Hungary and Poland. Calculate the average of these two values (15.5). Subtract the rest's average from the Western Europe average to find the difference.
